rulings.Case Title: DERRICK R.L. CHEN ET AL VS. PROSPECT PATH LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Derrick Chen, Stanley Chen, Wai Tang, And Eventuate, Llc'S Motion To Compel Further Responses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2017 line 7. Plaintiffs Derrick Chen, Stanley Chen, Wai Tang, And Eventuate, Llc'S Motion To Compel Further Responses GRANTED. Defendants Kim and Weber shall provide further responses to (a) Requests for Production 1-10 and 19 limited to verified annual statements of income and expenses and annual balance sheets for MKRA for the two years preceding the cessation of business operations in the leased premises.; (b) Requests for Production 12, 12, 20 limited to parties to the action; (c) Requests for Production 22; (d) Form Interrogatories 2.5, 17.1 (as to Requests for Admission 28, 29 and 31) and 50.2. All objections on grounds of calling for a legal conclusion contained in Defendants' Responses to Requests for Admission are overruled. Request for sanctions is denied.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAMANTHA LEE SETO MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. MARTHE SCHREIBER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT MARTHE SCHREIBER's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS GRANTED. The purported August 11, 2017 substitute service is quashed. The Court also notes that Plaintiff failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's October 10, 2017 Order. In the future failure to comply with SFRL 2.7B will result in consequences as described in SFLR 2.7B.= (501/REQ)
